name: ruby-on-rails-api
description: A production-ready Rails 7+ API-only backend with Active Record, JWT authentication, background jobs via Sidekiq, and a full RSpec test suite. Built for teams delivering mobile or SPA frontends on a well-structured Ruby backend.
unified_instruction:
# Ruby on Rails API

## Stack
- **Framework**: Rails 7+ (API mode)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL via Active Record
- **Auth**: JWT (devise-jwt or rodauth)
- **Background Jobs**: Sidekiq + Redis
- **Serialisation**: jsonapi-serializer / blueprinter
- **Testing**: RSpec + FactoryBot + Shoulda Matchers
- **Language**: Ruby 3.3+

## Project Structure
```
app/
  controllers/api/v1/  # Versioned API controllers (thin)
  models/              # Active Record models
  services/            # Business logic (plain Ruby objects)
  serializers/         # Response serialisers
  jobs/                # Sidekiq jobs
db/
  migrate/             # Active Record migrations
spec/
  requests/            # RSpec request specs (integration)
  models/              # RSpec model unit specs
  factories/           # FactoryBot factories
```

## Conventions
- Controllers are thin — delegate to service objects immediately
- All API routes are versioned: `/api/v1/...`
- Never return raw Active Record models — always use a serialiser
- Business logic lives in plain Ruby service classes, not callbacks
- Every endpoint has a corresponding request spec

## Key Commands
```bash
bundle exec rails server         # Start dev server
bundle exec rails db:migrate     # Apply migrations
bundle exec rspec                # Run test suite
bundle exec sidekiq              # Start background worker
bundle exec rubocop              # Lint Ruby code
```
